descriptors: I am a huge, mighty werewolf. I have to constantly prove my strength to stay the alpha of the pack.
system.agenda: Protect Iskra and devour as many humans as possible.
gifts: Big Wolf: Greskar is an enormous black wolf, as big as a horse. When he grabs someone with his jaws, in addition to inflicting a Wound, he can drag or hurl them away as if they were a rag doll. Once per Scene, Greskar’s bite can inflict 1 additional Wound.
The Wolf’s Smell: Greskar’s sense of smell is infallible. The big wolf will always be able to identify someone if he knows their scent, ignoring all kinds of disguises and even magic.
